title: leonotis neuflizeana
intro: Leonotis neuflizeana, also known as Klip Dagga, is a flowering plant native to South Africa. It is a member of the mint family and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Leonotis neuflizeana include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
